_comment: Real Dossier IDs only. 'mailto-contact-form' and 'opening-hours' are required because a clinic without a contact path or opening-hour visibility fails the basic 'patient-in-pain-on-Sunday' test. 'reviews-display', 'faq-accordion', 'pricing-table' and 'map-embed' are recommended because patient social proof, predictable answers, transparent pricing and walk-in directions are the highest-conversion signals on a healthcare site. Sections like 'hero', 'treatment-summary', 'treatment-list' and 'credentials' are declared in sections.json and must not appear here. See ADR 0012 for the Dossier vs Section distinction.

conditional.when: the clinic uses a third-party booking platform (Cliniko, Boka.se, KRY-style integrations) and wants its booking surface available on the home and treatments pages
